days ago 0 = No change, 1 = Improved, 2 = Deteriorated. "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space.
137 C1 C1_HEARING (C1) Hearing CHAR 1 Communications/hearing patterns: hearing. 0 = Hears Adequately - normal talk, TV, phone; 1 = Minimal Difficulty when not in quiet setting; 2 = Hears in special situations only - speaker has to adjust tonal quality and speak distinctly; 3 = Highly Impaired/absence of useful hearing; "-" = Unknown; -2 = Space.
138 C2A C2A_HEARAID_USED (C2A) Hearing Aid Present and Used CHAR 1
